movable_parts.name: sm_resuscitationbed_a01_wheel1_01
movable_parts.motion: Rolls along the ground. This is one of four identical wheels.

movable_parts.name: sm_resuscitationbed_a01_wheel1_01
movable_parts.motion: Swivels around a vertical axis for steering. This is one of four identical wheels.

movable_parts.name: sm_resuscitationbed_a01_bedbase_01
movable_parts.motion: The entire upper bed assembly moves vertically to adjust height.
movable_parts.range_description: Adjusts from a low position (~40cm) to a high position (~80cm).

movable_parts.name: sm_resuscitationbed_a01_panelsection3_01
movable_parts.motion: The backrest panel pivots upwards to raise the patient's head and torso.
movable_parts.range_description: Pivots from flat (0 degrees) to a raised position (approx. 75 degrees).

movable_parts.name: sm_resuscitationbed_a01_panelsection1_01
movable_parts.motion: The thigh-rest panel pivots upwards to raise the patient's knees.
movable_parts.range_description: Pivots from flat (0 degrees) to a raised position (approx. 30 degrees).

movable_parts.name: sm_resuscitationbed_a01_panelsection2_01
movable_parts.motion: The calf-rest panel pivots downwards from the raised knee position.
movable_parts.range_description: Pivots from a neutral position (0 degrees) downwards (approx. -20 degrees).

movable_parts.name: sm_resuscitationbed_a01_rail1_01
movable_parts.motion: The side rail pivots downwards to allow access to the patient. There are two such rails (rail1 and rail2).
movable_parts.range_description: Pivots from vertical (up) to horizontal (down), approx. 90 degrees.

movable_parts.name: sm_resuscitationbed_a01_pedal1_01
movable_parts.motion: Foot pedal pivots when pressed to activate functions like height adjustment or wheel locks. There are seven pedals.
movable_parts.range_description: Pivots down by a small amount, approx. 20-30 degrees.

movable_parts.name: sm_resuscitationbed_a01_ivpole_pipe2_01
movable_parts.motion: The inner pipe of the IV pole slides vertically to adjust its height.

movable_parts.name: sm_resuscitationbed_a01_bedtop_button1_01
movable_parts.motion: Control button that can be pressed. There are two buttons.

special_notes: Caster wheels require both swivel (Z-axis revolute) and roll (axle-axis revolute) joints. The complex hydraulic lift mechanism for height adjustment can be simplified to a single prismatic joint on the main bed base. The side rails should have a locking mechanism to hold them in the upright position.
